name: logicmonitor
description: Codex plugin for the LogicMonitor MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Source-of-truth access to the LogicMonitor MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex with a narrow, repo-local plugin wrapper around the LogicMonitor MCP server. Standard mode uses bearer-token-first access, while Advanced local mode delegates to the project launcher for listener-backed sessions.
defaultPrompt: Check LogicMonitor state through the MCP server.
Use the local launcher for listener-backed sessions.
